subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of the Most Glorious Beauty! Consider thou what a supreme bounty this is, and what a mighty favor. Praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز جمال ابهی ملاحظه نما که چه موهبت کبراست و رحمت عظمی الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition
